name: Thai Fish Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones from fish.
2. Blend or process fish, egg, coriander, sugar, and red curry paste until mixed and smooth.
3. Combine the mixture with green beans in a bowl and mix well.
4. Roll 2 level tablespoons of fish mixture into a ball, then flatten slightly. Repeat with remaining mixture.
5. Just before serving, deep-fry fish cakes in hot oil until well browned and cooked. Drain on absorbent paper.
6. Serve with sweet chilli sauce if desired. Serves 6.
Red Curry Paste Blend or process all ingredients until smooth.
